data.body: FIXED S1 CI regression: main() now calls build_server(cfg) + server.run(transport=...), which broke 2 monkeypatch fakes in tests/interfaces/store/test_fsck_ensures.py (0-arg fakes / no-transport stub.run). Updated the 3 fake signatures (assertions unchanged). Amended into S1, rebased S2 onto it, then rebased whole stack onto current origin/main (da7f11fc0). Full suite: 6049 passed, 1 failed (test_resolve_symbol yaml — worktree-local artifact: nested .venv classified repo-local; passes in CI flat layout, confirmed by patchset-1 CI). Re-pushed: 713 ps2 (with fix) + 716 ps2 (rebased). Change-Ids preserved. CI re-running Verified. Starting S3 review.
